description: Port src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts into a deployed vendor-facing Lambda endpoint. Scope: read raw request body with maxStripeWebhookPayloadBytes; require and verify stripe-signature before processing; resolve Stripe API secret and webhook queue config; call handleStripeWebhook with DynamoDB webhook-processing/idempotency repository, Stripe mirror repository, SQS enqueue, and billing activation integration; preserve retry/idempotency behavior; return provider-appropriate status codes without leaking internal details. Wire POST /api/webhooks/stripe in CDK with raw payload handling, DynamoDB permissions, SQS send permissions, and Stripe secret access. Acceptance criteria: live route exists; invalid signature/missing signature fail; oversize payload fails; known webhook fixture succeeds/idempotently processes; alarms/metrics remain compatible with existing webhook lag/signature failure observability.
title: Add Stripe webhook Lambda for POST /api/webhooks/stripe
